# InfinityKit - Dynamic AI-Readable Web Utilities Catalog

InfinityKit is a premium suite of secure, high-performance web applications and digital utilities executed completely client-side in the browser. By leveraging local browser calculations, InfinityKit guarantees absolute user privacy, zero data uploads, and complete serverless security.

## Core Features & Core Values
- **100% Client-Side Privacy:** All files, PDF operations, images, audio, video, calculations, and conversions are computed in-memory in the browser. Zero user data is uploaded to external servers.
- **Microsecond Speeds:** High-performance, lightweight browser-based algorithms render calculations instantly.
- **Zero Tracker Intrusion:** Open-access ecosystem with absolute zero telemetry, cookie payloads, or analytical monitoring.
- **Premium Apple + Linear UI:** Beautiful White-Theme glassmorphic cards, diagonal ambient glows, and responsive typography optimized for all desktop and mobile displays.

---

## Tool Categories & Route Catalog

### 📄 Document & PDF Utilities
- **Add Custom Text Watermarks to PDFs:** `/tools/watermarkpdf` - Stamp diagonal custom watermarks locally in browser.
- **Combine Multiple PDFs into One:** `/tools/mergepdf` - Merge PDF file buffers instantly.
- **Split PDF Pages & Extract Ranges:** `/tools/splitpdf` - Slice and extract pages from target PDFs.
- **Lock PDF Files with Secure Password:** `/tools/protect-pdf` - Client-side AES encryption for PDF vaults.
- **Unlock & Decrypt Protected PDFs:** `/tools/unlock-pdf` - Decrypt and unlock password-gated documents.
- **Convert PDF Pages to Images:** `/tools/pdftoimage` - Render PDF documents into JPG/PNG sheets.
- **Convert Images & Photos into PDF:** `/tools/imagetopdf` - Pack screenshots and layouts into a single PDF.
- **Spin & Rotate PDF Pages:** `/tools/rotatepdf` - Correct orientation on rotated document pages.
- **AI PDF Key Highlights Summarizer:** `/tools/ai-summarize-pdf` - Fast in-browser overview summaries of documents.
- **AI Chat & Discuss with PDF:** `/tools/ai-chat-pdf` - Local context Q&A with dynamic file uploads.

### 🖼️ Graphic & Photo Utilities
- **Reduce Image File Size (Compressor):** `/tools/compressimage` - High-fidelity in-browser compression.
- **Resize Image Boundaries (Height & Width):** `/tools/resizeimage` - Set specific resolutions and bounds.
- **AI Background Stripper:** `/tools/bg-remover` - Auto background deletion.
- **DSLR Portrait Background Blur:** `/tools/blur-background` - Dynamic portrait blur effects.
- **Extract Text from Images (OCR):** `/tools/ocrimage` - In-browser optical character recognition.
- **Image Dimension & Detail Checker:** `/tools/imageinfo` - Audit image dimensions, file sizes, and properties.
- **Image Color Palette & Code Extractor:** `/tools/color-palette` - Pull color palettes and HEX/RGBA codes.
- **e-Signature Studio:** `/tools/e-signature` - Draw, save, and download signature png files.
- **Remove Secret Data from Photos (EXIF Stripper):** `/tools/metadata-stripper` - Scrub EXIF locations and camera metadata.

### 🎥 Multi-Media, Audio, & Video Utilities
- **Extract High-Quality Audio from Video:** `/tools/extract-audio` - Strip audio tracks directly.
- **Convert Video into Animated GIF:** `/tools/video-to-gif` - Render custom timing GIF clips.
- **Generate & Sync Video Subtitles:** `/tools/subtitles-generator` - Construct SRT files locally.
- **Convert Video & Audio to Text Transcripts:** `/tools/video-transcription` - Dynamic transcription.
- **Listen to Text Aloud (Voice Speaker):** `/tools/texttospeech` - Speech synthesis from text parameters.
- **Focus Ambient Noise Mixer (Rain, Forest):** `/tools/focus-soundscape` - Ambient white/brown noise generator.

### ✍️ Intelligent AI Writing Assistants
- **Infinity AI Chat & Assistant:** `/tools/chatbot` - Full conversational companion.
- **AI Smart Text Improver:** `/tools/text-improver` - Optimize draft voice, grammar, and flow.
- **AI Smart Text Summarizer:** `/tools/summarizer` - Condense draft layouts into highlights.
- **AI Canvas Art Generator:** `/tools/image-generator` - Generate custom artwork from text prompts.
- **Refine Prompts for AI Chatbots:** `/tools/smartsuggestions` - Enhance prompts for ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude.

### 📊 Personal Finance & Spending Ledgers
- **Record Daily Expense:** `/tools/expenseadd` - Record daily expenditures under custom labels.
- **View Expense Records History:** `/tools/expenselist` - View and search chronological transactions.
- **Savings & Monthly Budget Planner:** `/tools/budgettracker` - Allocate monthly limits and thresholds.
- **Spending Visual Graphs & Charts:** `/tools/expenseanalytics` - Radial visual breakdowns of cashflows.
- **Printable Expense & Income Statements Builder:** `/tools/dailymonthlyreport` - Compile structured cashflow statements.
- **Where Do I Spend Most? (Spending Chart):** `/tools/topspendinginsights` - Check major category leaks.
- **Search & Filter Expenses:** `/tools/searchexpenses` - Filter transactions by name, label, or price.
- **Reset & Delete Expense Records:** `/tools/resetexpenses` - Purge local records for safety.

### 🛠️ Utilities & Calculations
- **Body Weight & Health Analyzer (BMI):** `/tools/bmicalculator` - Instant weight-to-height screening assessments.
- **Pediatric & Adult Medicine Dose Calculator:** `/tools/drugdosage` - Pediatric & clinical mg/ml dosage estimations.
- **Saline & IV Fluid Drip Rate Calculator:** `/tools/ivdripcalc` - Calculate drops/minute (gtt) for medical infusions.
- **Daily Medicine Schedule Alarm & Organizer:** `/tools/medicinereminder` - Secure alarm system for medicine tracking.
- **Daily Tasks List & Progress Tracker:** `/tools/todolist` - Task list and micro-schedules with local storage syncing.
- **Quick Secure Notebook Vault:** `/tools/notes` - Quick text pads and markdown logs stored locally.
- **Pomodoro Study Focus Timer:** `/tools/timer` - Study focus timer.
- **Random Strong Password Generator:** `/tools/passwordgen` - Generate secure passwords locally.
- **Scan-to-Open QR Code Generator:** `/tools/qrcode-gen` - Create custom dynamic QR codes locally.
- **All-in-One Measurement Units Converter:** `/tools/unitconverter` - High-precision conversions across metrics.
- **Sales Discount & Final Price Calculator:** `/tools/discountcalc` - Estimate sales markdown savings.
- **Simple Percentage Calculator:** `/tools/percentagecalc` - Evaluate percentage multipliers.
- **LCM & HCF Finder (Lowest & Highest Factors):** `/tools/lcmhcf` - Find math factor limits.
- **Count Days and Time Between Dates:** `/tools/daysbetween` - Dynamic calendaring duration counts.
- **Decision Maker Spin-the-Wheel Picker:** `/tools/spinwheel` - Visual random selector.
- **Pick Random Winner from Names List:** `/tools/randomnamepicker` - Pick a random winner from list parameters.
- **Self-Destructing Secret Notes:** `/tools/note-shredder` - Destroy notes on reading timer limits.
- **Password Data Breach Database Checker:** `/tools/password-leak` - Safely audit leak status via k-anonymity.

### 💻 Developer Sandbox & SEO
- **SEO JSON-LD Structured Data Schema Maker:** `/tools/schema-generator` - Generate search-engine schemas.
- **JSON to TypeScript Code Converter:** `/tools/json-to-ts` - Autogenerate typings from payloads.
- **JSON Code Formatter & Beautifier:** `/tools/json-code` - Formats payload codes.
- **SVG Vector Image Compressor:** `/tools/svg-optimizer` - Sanitize and compress SVG path vectors.
- **Bulk File Batch Renamer:** `/tools/bulk-renamer` - Batch rename files client-side.
- **Website Search Engine Meta Tag Inspector:** `/tools/metatagviewer` - Inspect layout meta properties.

---

## Technical Architecture specifications
- **Framework:** Next.js (App Router React v18)
- **Deployment Endpoint:** Standard NextJS build compiled to statically optimized client page pathways
- **Asset Base Url:** `https://infinitykit.online`
- **Sitemap Location:** `https://infinitykit.online/sitemap.xml`
- **Robots Rules:** Direct crawl permission granted to all bots (`*`, `GPTBot`, `ClaudeBot`, `Google-Extended`, `PerplexityBot`)
